commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=065be136792fb276ab23873d91969fcbce016673)
commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the standalone Info page, moves app/gateway facts into Settings, adds persisted AppTheme and ShowDiagnostics settings, and gates Diagnostics navigation.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes from source: current main always declares the Debug footer item, while the PR maps missing ShowDiagnostics to a false packaged Release build default.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide or require a fix for the packaged Diagnostics default before merge; this is not a safe narrow automation repair because it changes upgrade/product behavior.

target.title: Reorganize Settings info and diagnostics
target.body: ## Summary - Problem: the Windows companion had a thin standalone Info page, duplicated Diagnostics/Support actions, and no user-facing app theme control. - Why it matters: Settings should follow Windows conventions, diagnostics should be available when explicitly enabled, and support/app metadata should be discoverable without a separate nav destination. - What changed: - Removed the standalone Info/About page and moved app + gateway facts into Settings → About as Win11-style info expanders. - Removed Diagnostics' duplicate Reconfigure action; Settings keeps the onboarding/setup entry point. - Added App theme (System/Light/Dark) and Enable Diagnostics settings with persistence and live nav updates. - Updated legacy `info` / `about` routing, localization resources, and contract/round-trip tests. - User impact: users see a simpler nav, app/gateway info under Settings → About, a live theme picker, and a Diagnostics page that follows build defaults but can be explicitly enabled. - What did NOT change: no new permissions, capabilities, network calls, command execution surfaces, or token/secret handling. ## Change Type (select all) - [ ] Bug fix - [x] Feature - [x] Refactor - [ ] Docs / instructions - [x] Tests / validation - [ ] Security hardening - [ ] Chore / infra ## Scope (select all touched areas) - [x] Tray / WinUI UX - [ ] Windows node capability - [ ] Local MCP / `winnode` - [x] Gateway / connection / pairing - [ ] Setup / onboarding - [ ] Permissions / privacy / security - [x] Tests / CI / docs ## Linked Issue/PR - Closes # - Related # - [ ] Related to a bug or regression ## Validation - `git diff --check` — passed - `. uild.ps1` — passed (Debug, win-arm64; Shared, Cli, WinNodeCli, SetupEngine, WinUI) - `dotnet test . ests yOpenClaw.Shared.Tests yOpenClaw.Shared.Tests.csproj` — passed: 2567 passed, 31 skipped - `dotnet test . ests yOpenClaw.Tray.Tests yOpenClaw.Tray.Tests.csproj` — passed: 1295 passed - Focused behavior proof tests: - `dotnet test . ests yOpenClaw.Tray.Tests yOpenClaw.Tray.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~SettingsRoundTripTests|FullyQualifiedName~DiagnosticsPageContractTests|FullyQualifiedName~LocalizationValidationTests"` - passed: 50 passed ## Real behavior proof - Environment tested: Windows ARM64, Debug build, direct unpackaged WinUI launch with normal tray profile for screenshots and isolated tray profile for non-mutating proof. - PR head / commit tested: `065be136` (`bkudiess-merge-diagnostics-info`). - Exact command run for isolated proof: ```powershell cd C:\Projects\copilot-worktrees\openclaw-windows-node\bkudiess-urban-bassoon .\run-app-local.ps1 -NoBuild -Isolated -AllowNonMain ``` - Current-head runtime evidence: ```text Launching OpenClaw Tray Branch: bkudiess-merge-diagnostics-info Configuration: Debug Runtime: win-arm64 Output: C:\Projects\copilot-worktrees\openclaw-windows-node\bkudiess-urban-bassoon\src\OpenClaw.Tray.WinUI\bin\Debug\net10.0-windows10.0.22621.0\win-arm64 Mode: Direct unpackaged executable Data dir: C:\Users\bakudies\AppData\Local\Temp\OpenClawTray\bkudiess-urban-bassoon-bkudiess-merge-diagnostics-info-38b4dc76 Launcher: C:\Projects\copilot-worktrees\openclaw-windows-node\bkudiess-urban-bassoon\src\OpenClaw.Tray.WinUI\bin\Debug\net10.0-windows10.0.22621.0\win-arm64\OpenClaw.Tray.WinUI.exe Started OpenClaw Tray (PID: 2280) ``` - Observed/runtime result: - The PR branch app starts from an isolated data dir, so Settings/Gateway/Diagnostics changes can be exercised without mutating `%APPDATA%\OpenClawTray`. - Focused tests cover the changed persistence and UI contracts: `AppTheme`, nullable `ShowDiagnostics`, diagnostics nav gating/dispatch, legacy `info`/`about` routing, and localization key parity. ## Rubber-duck review - Ran rubber-duck review over the final uncommitted diff. - Result: no blocking issues. - Follow-up fixes applied before PR: - Moved theme/nav UI updates in `App.OnSettingsSaved` onto the dispatcher-safe UI path. - Made `DiagnosticsGate.IsVisible` null-safe when settings are not initialized. - Seeded About/Gateway strings into all locales and removed the en-us-only fallback allowance. - Updated contract/localization tests accordingly. ## Security Impact (required) - New permissions/capabilities? (`No`) - Secrets/tokens handling changed? (`No`) - New/changed network calls? (`No`) - Command/tool execution surface changed? (`No`) - Data access scope changed? (`No`) - If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation: N/A ## Compatibility / Migration - Backward compatible? (`Yes`) - Config/env changes? (`Yes`): settings now persist `AppTheme` and nullable `ShowDiagnostics`. - Migration needed? (`No`) - If yes, exact upgrade steps: N/A - Missing `AppTheme` defaults to `System`. - Missing `ShowDiagnostics` stays `null` and follows the build default (`true` in Debug/unpackaged local builds, false for packaged Release unless user overrides in Settings). ## Review Conversations - [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR. - [x] I left unresolved only conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.
target.author: bkudiess

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
